clauses.title: Eligibility Age Requirement
clauses.text: Youth refers to Daejeon residents aged 19 to 39.

clauses.title: Required Documents for Participation Programs
clauses.text: Applicants must submit resident registration, a participation plan, proof of local residence, and a policy feedback consent document.

clauses.title: Annual Implementation Plan Deadline
clauses.text: The mayor announces the annual youth implementation plan by March 31 and may publish an additional update notice.

clauses.title: Project Support Amount Standard
clauses.text: Project support amount is up to 7000000 KRW per team and may include mentoring payment.
